html:
2026-0364
2026-04-21ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance SectionReappointment of Linda Ann Bell of Victoria, British Columbia, as a full-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective May 4, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section
precis: Reappointment of Linda Ann Bell of Victoria, British Columbia, as a full-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective May 4, 2026.
